final_answer:
Short answer: **it’s working at build level now, but not fully proven live yet**.

Non-tech version of what was done:
- A required bridge piece was missing, so we wired it in properly.
- Two bridge parts were speaking different “code versions,” so we aligned that.
- We also made the bridge compile step automatically prepare what it needs, so it doesn’t break the same way again.
- After that, all three bridge code areas compiled successfully.

What this means:
- Good: the bridge now builds cleanly.
- Not done yet: full end-to-end bridge behavior still needs test runs to confirm live working flow.
